title: Commercial Banks – Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning (Second Amendment) Directions, 2026 (SNFA amendments)
description: <cite index="57-2,57-3">The RBI issued final directions for commercial banks, small finance banks (SFBs) and non-banking financial companies (NBFCs), directing them not to recognise unrealised interest and charges as income when they acquire specified non-financial assets (SNFAs) in resolution of stressed loans, following the finalisation of the Prudential Norms on Specified Non-Financial Assets (SNFA) after examining stakeholder feedback.</cite> <cite index="57-4">The amended directions will come into force from October 1.</cite>
